title: II39contrast
description: Resource pack inspired by vanilla High Contrast (Optifine not needed)
body:
Resource pack inspired by vanilla High Contrast (Optifine not needed)  

CHANGED IN IT:  
- panorama overlay  
- folder gui (full)  
- the fire on the screen is lower than usual for ease of play  
- removed the edition file in the title folder  
- the map and its icons have been made more pleasing to the eye  
- icons/sprites/toast have been simplified  
- left the background when creating a new world (maybe in the future it will also be changed to leaves)  

﻿ If you find any errors or have any suggestions, please write me
